data.value: Land a low-risk cleanup batch — the full logging/traceability hardening set, a fix for the infinitely-growing workspace chat transcript, removal of the leaked agent-session transcript from PR #340 — capped by a patch version bump to 0.9.1.

value: The plot-side EVENT_ACL.intent_edited widening (warren-df1b) — it spans the sibling ../plot repo and is out of scope for this warren-only batch
Investigation/forensics-only seeds with no code deliverable (warren-d5e5, PR #270 truthfulness audit)
The grandfathered file-size burndown refactor (warren-c65d) — large and explicitly one-per-patrol
New observability backends, dashboards, or metrics surfaces beyond the additive logging the audit (warren-3679) named
Create a new umbrella Plot; adopt the existing pl-f700 logging steps as a contiguous sub-sequence rather than re-authoring them
Each seed lands as its own PR, walked serially and gated on the prior PR merging (mirrors the polish-pass pl-a141 convention)
Logging work is additive observability only — no run-lifecycle behavior change except the warren-af76 socket-timeout correctness fix
The chat-scroll fix must engage the existing internal overflow-y-auto in Chat.tsx by bounding ancestor height, not introduce a new scroll container
The version bump edits both package.json and src/index.ts VERSION in sync (release workflow fails on drift) and adds a matching CHANGELOG.md section
All work passes bun run check:all (lint, typecheck, size, debt, dups, coverage, etc.) before merge

spawnRun (src/runs/spawn/dispatch.ts) logs placement, provision+dispatch success/latency, and every rollback branch incl. the swallowed finalize/burrow-destroy failures, carrying run_id + request_id (warren-c686)
Spawn failures persist as a spawn_failed system event + runs.failure_reason, so RunDetail shows the cause (warren-fc6e)
One HTTP access-log line per request (method, path, status, duration_ms) + a warn on every deny; docker-compose json-file log rotation configured (warren-26c2)
Per-run child loggers bound once in bridge/reap/detector entry points; loggers non-optional in run-lifecycle inputs; dotted subsystem.action event-name convention repo-wide (warren-9f06)
pino redacts token-shaped fields (GITHUB_TOKEN, bearer values); a periodic operational-stats line is emitted from SQLite data (warren-b2dd)
The stream bridge no longer loops forever on burrow socket timeouts and finalizes the run (warren-af76)
The workspace conversation transcript scrolls internally and the /workspaces page no longer grows unbounded
The leaked .pi/sessions agent transcript from PR #340 is removed from the repo (warren-4c8d)
VERSION in src/index.ts and package.json are both 0.9.1 and in sync, with a CHANGELOG.md 0.9.1 section

Chat ordering/dedup fix lives in src/ui/src/components/chat-messages.ts: merge transcript + stream bubbles on a single unified ordering key instead of concatenating the two seq-sorted groups, and tighten the dedupe so a streamed turn and its persisted copy collapse to one bubble
On the workspace conversation surface, user and agent turns render in correct chronological order across the transcript/stream boundary (no transcript-first-then-stream reordering)
No assistant message is duplicated when a streamed turn and its persisted transcript copy both exist; buildChatMessages dedupe is covered by a regression test in chat-messages.test.ts

data.value: Land a low-risk cleanup batch — the full logging/traceability hardening set, fixes for the workspace chat surface (unbounded growth, out-of-order turns, and duplicated assistant messages), and removal of the leaked agent-session transcript from PR #340 — capped by a patch version bump to 0.9.1.
